arts.ttl: Reports: Tah in talks with Barcelona
arts.sum: FC Barcelona have reportedly stepped up their interest in Bayer Leverkusen defender Jonathan Tah.

arts.ttl: Man Utd 'Very Keen' to Sign £400,000-a-Week Barcelona Star for Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United are among a number of Premier League clubs interested in Barcelona midfielder Frenkie de Jong.

arts.ttl: Lionel Messi sends emotional message to Barcelona fans and reveals his wish for the future - after club celebrates 125h anniversary in style
arts.sum: The Argentinian joined Barca aged 13 - his first youth contract scrawled on a restaurant napkin - and tore up the history books for 17 seasons.

arts.ttl: Barcelona leading race for Bayer Leverkusen’s Jonathan Tah
arts.sum: For some time Bayern Munich appeared to be in pole position to sign Bayer Leverkusen’s Jonathan Tah when his contract expires in the summer, but Barcelona have moved ahead of…
Barcelona hold talks with Jonathan Tah's agent - Football España Barcelona have deadline for Dani Olmo registration - club forced to activate €200m economic lever - Football España

arts.ttl: Juventus and Inter transfer blow as Barcelona lead Tah race after crunch meeting
arts.sum: Reports claim Barcelona are leading the race to sign Inter and Juventus target Jonathan Tah...

arts.ttl: Lionel Messi sends heartfelt message to Barcelona fans on 125th anniversary
arts.sum: Lionel Messi's association with Barcelona ended in 2021 with the club's financial struggles ruling out the possibility of a contract extension.

arts.ttl: Arsenal in ‘advanced talks’ to beat Barcelona to ‘Pedri clone’
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly beating Barcelona in the race to sign Alberto Moleiro, who has often been compared to Pedri . Lille head coach Bruno Genesio spoke highly of the teenage talent earlier this year.
Joe Champion has provided a score prediction for all 10 matches taking place in LaLiga on Friday, Saturday, Sunday and Monday.

arts.ttl: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick tells two players they can leave in January
arts.sum: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick has surprised many with the faith he has shown in La Masia in his first season at the club, but it has brought excellent results in the form Marc Bernal and Marc Casado. However it has become apparent that there are some players that Flick is not entirely convinced by.
